info.title: Magpi Outbound & Inbound API
info.description: OpenAPI description of the Magpi (magpi.com, formerly DataDyne / EpiSurveyor) mobile data collection API surface used by the OpenFn language-magpi adaptor. The adaptor's `fetchSurveyData` operation POSTs form-encoded credentials to the Get Survey Data endpoint (https://www.magpi.com/api/surveydata/v3) and receives an XML `SurveyDataList` document, which the adaptor parses to JSON. Its `submitRecord` operation POSTs an XML record to the Inbound `mobileApi/uploadData` endpoint. The upstream API is XML-based; response schemas here model the JSON shape the adaptor produces after XML->JSON conversion so they can seed mock collections.

post.description: Fetches submission records for a form/survey. Credentials and filters are sent as an application/x-www-form-urlencoded body (username, accesstoken, surveyid, startdate, enddate). The upstream response is XML; the adaptor converts it to the JSON shape modelled here.

200.description: Survey data list for the requested survey.

post.summary: Get survey data (v2, includes sub-form data)
post.description: Version 2 of Get Survey Data, which additionally returns sub-form (repeating group) data. Same form-encoded request parameters as v3.

200.description: Survey data list including sub-form data.

post.description: Version 1 of the Get Survey Data endpoint. Returns top-level submission records for a survey using the same form-encoded credentials and date filters.

200.description: Survey data list for the requested survey.

post.summary: Upload / submit a record to an existing form
post.description: Inbound API endpoint. The adaptor serialises the supplied JSON payload to an XML `<form>` document and POSTs it here using the configured username/password. Submits a single record against a form/survey that already exists in the Magpi account.

SurveyDataRequest.description: Form-encoded request parameters for the Get Survey Data endpoints.

username.description: Magpi username that owns the access token.

accesstoken.description: API access token generated for the user.

surveyid.description: Identifier of the survey/form whose data is being fetched.

startdate.description: Only return submissions on or after this date (must be used with enddate).

enddate.description: Only return submissions on or before this date (must be used with startdate).

start.description: Pagination offset (index of first record to return).

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.

SurveyDataList.description: Container returned by the Get Survey Data endpoints (XML SurveyDataList, converted to JSON).

SurveyData.description: Submission records. Upstream XML may return a single object or an array; the adaptor normalises to an array.
A single survey submission. Answer fields are dynamic per form, so arbitrary string-valued properties are permitted alongside the well-known metadata fields.

LastSubmissionDate.description: Timestamp of the most recent submission in the list; the adaptor stores this as state.lastSubmissionDate for incremental fetches.

surveyId.description: Survey identifier, stamped onto each record by the adaptor.

source.description: Source label stamped onto each record by the adaptor.

additionalProperties.description: Form-specific answer values keyed by question/field name.

RecordUpload.description: A record to submit to an existing form. The adaptor serialises this JSON object into an XML <form> element. Field names correspond to the target form's questions.

surveyid.description: Identifier of the form/survey to submit against.

data.description: Answer values keyed by field name.

UploadResponse.description: Result of an inbound uploadData submission.

recordId.description: Identifier assigned to the newly created record.
